dahua_db.query: SELECT TOP 500 CAST(UserID AS varchar(128)) AS person_id, EventTime AS event_ts, Direction AS direction, VerifyMode AS verify_mode, CAST(LogID AS varchar(128)) AS external_log_id, DeviceSerial AS device_serial, DeviceName AS device_name FROM AttendanceLogs WHERE EventTime > :last_event_ts ORDER BY EventTime ASC
